gameInfoCard.pleaseSelectGame: Please select a game to see game details.
gameInfoCard.selectGame: Select a game to view details and play.

gameSelect.moreGamesAvailableToJoin: There are more games available to join!
gameSelect.noGamesJoined: You haven't joined any games yet. Join a game to start playing!
gameSelect.pleaseSelectGameToManageFeatures: Please select a game to manage game features.

placesOptions.description: Toggle this setting to show or hide the permanent name labels above each place pin on the map. This setting is saved to your session.
placesOptions.showLabelsDescription: Toggle this setting to show or hide the permanent name labels above each place pin on the map. This setting is saved to your session.
placesOptions.showVisibleDescription: Only show places that are currently visible in the map viewport.
placesOptions.copyDescription: Copy places from another game into the current game.
placesOptions.deleteAllDescription: Delete all places from the current game. This action cannot be undone.
placesOptions.importDescription: Import places from a JSON or CSV file.
placesOptions.exportDescription: Export all places to a JSON or CSV file.
